{{documentation}}
An infobox describing an NPC. This should be used for NPC pages.

==Usage==
<pre>
{{Infobox NPC
|name = The name of the NPC
|image = Image of the NPC
|imagesize = The size of the image (if not default)
|release = Release date of the NPC
|update = Update name corresponding to the release date (exclude the Update: namespace)
|race = Race of the NPC
|gender = Gender of the NPC
|location = Where can the NPC be found
|aka = Other known names of the NPC
}}
</pre>

==Example==
<pre>
{{Infobox NPC
|name = Wise Old Man
|image = Wise Old Man.png
|release = 15 April 2025
|update = RuneScape: Dragonwilds is out!
|race = Human
|gender = Male
|location = Temple of Saradomin & Bramblemead Village
|aka = Dionysius
}}</pre>

{{Infobox NPC
|name = Wise Old Man
|image = Wise Old Man.png
|release = 15 April 2025
|update = RuneScape: Dragonwilds is out!
|race = Human
|gender = Male
|location = Temple of Saradomin & Bramblemead Village
|aka = Dionysius
}}
{{clear}}
{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"name": {
			"label": "Name",
            "description": "The name of the NPC",
			"type": "string",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"image": {
			"label": "Image",
			"type": "wiki-file-name",
            "description": "Image of the NPC",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"imagesize": {
			"label": "Image size",
            "description": "The size of the image (if not default)",
			"type": "number",
			"default": "300"
		},
		"race": {
			"label": "Race",
            "description": "Race of the NPC",
			"type": "string"
		},
		"gender": {
			"label": "Gender",
            "description": "Gender of the NPC",
			"type": "string"
		},
		"location": {
			"label": "Location",
            "description": "Where can the NPC be found",
			"type": "string",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"aka": {
			"type": "string",
            "label": "AKA",
            "description": "Other known names of the NPC"
		}
	},
	"paramOrder": [
		"name",
		"image",
		"imagesize",
		"location",
		"race",
		"gender",
		"aka"
	]
}
</templatedata>
}}
